title: Create: Redstone Additions
description: Mod that adds logic gates and other Redstone components.
body:
# About Create: Redstone Additions

Create: Redstone Additions is an original mod by [Slimik42](https://modrinth.com/user/Slimik42) that introduces several redstone components designed to simplify some circuits. You can find the original project here at [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-redstone-additions). # Mod Content: ## Diode ![Only one way in and out!](https://i.imgur.com/04KO22Q.png) > Passes the signal only in one direction, but unlike a repeater, does not update it. ## Conjunctor ![Two ways and you're in!](https://i.imgur.com/4tjEkz7.png) > Activated if it receives a signal from the right and left. ## Disjunctor ![Anyway in and you're there!](https://i.imgur.com/Cf0GzLB.png) > Activated if it receives a signal from the right or left. ## Inverter ![On? No. No? Yes](https://i.imgur.com/yghEkf0.png) > On if there is no signal and off if there is one. ## Crossroad ![Please go one and the one next to you the other way...](https://i.imgur.com/k0TABSv.png) > Compact bridge for redstone. ## Resistors ![Resistors too have personalities you know?](https://i.imgur.com/T2VMe9v.png) > Reduce redstone signal by 1, 2, 5 and 10 depending on the type. ## Requires Create!

> Obviously as always. Includes fully detailed Ponder screens showcasing functions of each block. ![Example Ponder](https://i.imgur.com/T8FE25r.png) ## Additional Info You can use JEI/REI/EMI to view recipes. Also includes a minor crafting recipe for [Copperative](https://modrinth.com/mod/copperative). But you don't need it to play the game. And it's only for Forge! You have alternative recipes in place. The map in the picture is [Alpha Industries](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/create-mod-alpha-industries-the-factory-that-makes-everything/) map by [pointnclick14](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/pointnclick14/) on PlanetMinecraft. Shaderpack is [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined). ## DISCLAIMER Original code is by [Slimik42](https://modrinth.com/user/Slimik42). I, [SiliconCarbideCube](https://modrinth.com/user/SiliconCarbideCube) did minor changes, ported the mod to Fabric and republished well under original author's permissions. Including but not limited to: - Refactoring codebase - Tighter integration with Create - Fixed bugs - Ported to Fabric! Please forward your issues and suggestions to [Create: Redstone Additions Repository](https://github.com/SiliconCarbideCube/create-redstone-additions) under the correct label. That means Forge issues will go to Forge label and Fabric issues will go to Fabric label. Licensed under AGPL 3.0 license. And yes, you can absolutely use this in a modpack. No need to ask permission! Just comply with the license.
